name: [BUG-002] Board list has no pagination support
description:
Expected: ?page and ?per_page query params to paginate results.
        Actual:   All boards returned at once — no pagination metadata.
descriptionHtml:
Expected: ?page and ?per_page query params to paginate results.
    Actual:   All boards returned at once — no pagination metadata.
statusMessage:
XFAIL BUG-002: GET /api/boards/ does not support pagination

AssertionError: Pagination metadata (page, per_page, total_pages) not present in response
assert ('page' in {'boards': [{'created_at': '2026-05-18T09:25:00.458526', 'description': 'API development tasks for sprint 1', 'id': 1, 'member_count': 3, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-05-18T09:25:00.463524', 'description': 'Test planning and automation tasks', 'id': 2, 'member_count': 2, ...}], 'total': 2})

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-002: GET /api/boards/ does not support pagination')

tags: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-002: GET /api/boards/ does not support pagination')
